query: UPDATE clientes SET codigo = REPLACE(codigo, 'CLI-', '') WHERE codigo LIKE 'CLI-%';
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 49151bcmSzJvACt.c1decb00aa64 --database i9dRshPFnDefFw9MJLeLri --execute UPDATE clientes SET codigo = REPLACE(codigo, 'CLI-', '') WHERE codigo LIKE 'CLI-%';
